temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A man in a lime-green suit jacket and a blue shirt walks with a serious expression down a narrow, dimly lit commercial corridor. He checks his watch, appearing to be in a hurry. Behind him, another man in a patterned shirt follows closely, and a third man in a dark shirt brings up the rear. (Storyline: The scene introduces a group of men, establishing a sense of urgency and purpose as the man in the green jacket leads the way.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A fast-paced, percussive, and tense musical score begins, setting a suspenseful mood.)
(00:03-00:05) The camera pans to the right, moving past a series of illuminated fish tanks. The tanks are filled with green aquatic plants and small fish, creating a slightly eerie and contrasting visual against the tense music. (Storyline: This shot serves as a transition, using the fish tanks to momentarily break the tension and focus on the environment before revealing the next character.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, rhythmic music continues.)
